login.title: Sign in
login.subtitle: Welcome back to Millo
login.oauthFailed: Social login failed. Please try again or use email and password.
login.oauthNotConfigured: Social login is not available right now. Please use email and password.

register.title: Create account
register.subtitle: Join the Millo community
register.passwordMin: Password must be at least 8 characters.

home.title: Millo
home.noStreams: No live streams right now. Check back soon!
home.errorDesc: Check your connection and try again.

calls.title: Calls
calls.noCallsDesc: Request a paid call from a creator's profile.
calls.requestFromProfile: Go to a creator profile and tap "Request call" to start.
calls.endCallConfirm: End this call? You will be charged for the time used.

search.noResultsHint: Try searching for a creator, stream, or product.
search.startHint: Search for creators, streams and products.

profile.title: Profile
profile.signOutDesc: You'll need to sign back in to access your account.
profile.logoutConfirm: Are you sure you want to log out?
profile.deleteConfirm: This will permanently delete your account and all data. This cannot be undone.
profile.emailNotVerified: ⚠ Email not verified — check your inbox
profile.biometricTapEnable: Tap to enable for quick sign-in
profile.biometricNotAvail: Biometric sign-in not available on this device
profile.biometricAuthFailed: Could not verify your identity. Biometric sign-in not enabled.
profile.pwResetSent: Password reset email sent. Check your inbox.
profile.creatorPendingDesc: Under review — we'll notify you by email.

blocked.title: Blocked Users
blocked.emptyDesc: Users you block will appear here.
blocked.unblockConfirm: Unblock {{name}}? They will be able to see your profile and send you messages again.

privacy.title: Privacy & Data
privacy.exportDesc: Get a copy of your data (profile, messages, purchases, etc.) in JSON format.
privacy.deleteDesc: This will permanently delete your account and all data. This cannot be undone.
privacy.deleteFinalDesc: Your account and all data will be permanently deleted.

wallet.title: Wallet & Payouts
wallet.payoutDesc: Earnings from gifts and subscriptions can be withdrawn to your connected Stripe account. Minimum $5.00 · Processing 1–3 business days.
wallet.payoutSubmitted: Payout request submitted. We'll process it within 1–3 business days.
wallet.confirmPayoutBody:
Request a payout of ${{amount}}?
Processing takes 1–3 business days.

goLive.title: Go Live
goLive.obsCopy: Paste this into OBS or your streaming software
goLive.obsStep1: Add a Media Source or Game Capture
goLive.obsStep3: Set Stream key to the value above
goLive.errorTitleTooLong: Title must be {{max}} characters or less
goLive.errorPriceTooLow: PPV price must be at least {{min}}

live.title: Live Now
live.streamNotAvail:
Stream playback URL not available yet.
The creator may still be setting up.
live.errorDesc: Check your connection and try again.

shop.title: Shop
shop.noProductsDesc: Products from creators will appear here
shop.errorDesc: Check your connection and try again.

coinStore.title: Coin Store
coinStore.infoText: Use coins to send gifts, unlock exclusive content, and subscribe to creators.
coinStore.securityNote: Payments are processed securely by Stripe. Your card details never touch our servers.
coinStore.termsNote: Coins are non-refundable and have no cash value outside the platform.
coinStore.devModeAdded: {{count}} coins added to your wallet (dev mode).
coinStore.errorDesc: Check your connection and try again.

subscribe.title: Subscribe
subscribe.successDesc: You now have full access to {{name}}'s exclusive content.
subscribe.termsNote: Coins are deducted from your wallet. Cancel any time.
subscribe.errorDesc: Check your connection and try again.

subscriptions.title: Subscriptions
subscriptions.emptySub: Subscribe to your favourite creators to unlock exclusive content, badges and rewards.
subscriptions.dialogBody:
Cancel your subscription to {{name}}?
You'll keep access until {{date}}.
subscriptions.errorDesc: Check your connection and try again.

replays.title: Replays
replays.noReplaysDesc: Recorded streams will appear here once they finish processing.
replays.errorDesc: Check your connection and try again.
